name: aurora-pagination
title: Aurora Pagination
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Page navigation controls with Aurora neutral button style and active accent page indicator.
docs:
Aurora Pagination installs with its declared Aurora registry dependencies.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-button` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/pagination.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`.
